prestazioni: L15B7 hybrid-specific ECU reflash via Hondata FlashPro Manager v4.5.2, optimizing the Atkinson-cycle 1.5L turbocharged engine (L15B7) and IPU (Integrated Power Unit) for a 15% increase in electric motor torque (from 135 Nm to 155 Nm) while maintaining CVT longevity via custom shift logic maps for the P7F transmission

Garrett GT2259S turbocharger upgrade with billet compressor wheel (60mm inducer, 72mm exducer) and TiAL MV-R 38mm wastegate, paired with a custom 3-inch stainless steel downpipe (MagnaFlow 19409) and a PTP 3.5-inch cat-back exhaust system with resonated mid-pipe for hybrid-specific scavenging

KW Suspensions Clubsport coilovers (3-way adjustable, 80mm stroke) with custom valving for the CR-V's AWD platform, paired with SuperPro poly bushings (SPF1115K) for the rear subframe and Whiteline front sway bar (BSK007) to mitigate torque steer under hybrid boost
estetica: Liberty Walk LB-WORKS CR-V Hybrid widebody kit (LWB-CRV19) with carbon fiber fenders, front splitter, and rear diffuser, designed specifically for the 5th-gen CR-V's hybrid battery cooling vents

Rays Gram Lights 57Xtreme 19x9.5 +35 front and 19x10.5 +40 rear wheels with Yokohama Advan Sport A/S+ 255/40/19 and 275/35/19 tires, paired with DBA 5000 Series rotors and Project Mu HC+ brake pads for hybrid weight bias

Seibon Carbon hood (CRV19-HOOD) with integrated NACA ducts for hybrid battery cooling, paired with a custom LED underglow kit (Oracle Lighting 5630 SMD) synced to the hybrid system's regenerative braking via Arduino-based CAN bus integration
